scripts.deploy: yarn build && docker compose down --remove-orphans && NDX_GIT_REF=$(git branch --show-current) docker compose build --no-cache ndx-agent && docker compose run --rm -T --workdir /opt/ndx ndx-agent yarn test && docker compose run --rm -T --workdir /opt/ndx ndx-agent ndx --mock "create a file named /workspace/tmp/ndx-docker-verify.txt with text verified" && docker compose down --remove-orphans
